channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
item.description: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

item.title: DeFi protocol Summer.fi halts Lazy Summer vaults after $6 million exploit
item.description: The protocol’s SUMR token fell by over 18% after the incident.

item.title: Cantor says Strategy's recovery hinges on restoring STRC to par
item.description: Bringing Strategy's preferred shares back to $100 is key to restarting Strategy's capital engine, the bank said, with repeated management actions expected to support both preferred and common shareholders.

item.title: Crypto hacks fell 47% in H1 but ecosystem is no safer: CertiK
item.description: Crypto exploits rose 59% quarter-on-quarter to $807.5 million in Q2, due partly to the KelpDAO and Drift Protocol exploits, which came at the hands of North Korean hackers.

item.title: Strategy sells 3,588 Bitcoin for $216M to fund dividends, keeps $2.55B reserve intact
item.description: Strategy sold $216 million in Bitcoin to fund its dividend payments, as wealth manager Bernstein maintained its year-end Bitcoin price target of $150,000.

item.title: Bitmine added another $74 million in ether as Tom Lee bets on Clarity Act boost
item.description: The second-largest digital asset treasury increased its buying pace, while Strategy sold a chunk of its bitcoin holdings.

item.title: Ethereum 'Reinventing Itself' With Biggest Overhaul Since the Merge: Vitalik Buterin
item.description: Nearly every core piece of the protocol will be rebuilt over three to four years, with quantum safety and privacy moved front and center.

item.title: Strategy Sells $216M in Bitcoin for Dividends Under 'BTC Monetization Program'
item.description: The Bitcoin treasury giant sold $216 million worth of Bitcoin to cover preferred payouts, as an $8.3 billion quarterly loss piled up.

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically ups pace of bitcoin sales, raising $216 million
item.description: The company sold 3,588 bitcoin last week to replenish its dollar reserves for dividends on its preferred stock.

item.title: Belgian regulator flags 6 unauthorized crypto providers after MiCA deadline
item.description: Belgium’s FSMA warned consumers about six crypto-asset service providers it added to a fraudulent CASP list days after the EU’s MiCA transitional period expired.

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Surges Over Holiday Weekend
item.description: The ETF flows finally flip. Trump defends his billion-dollar crypto payday. And a rare set of signals says a bottom may be forming.

item.title: STRATEGY SELLS 3,588 BITCOIN IN PERIOD JUNE 29-JULY 5: 8K - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9TNzVhSnVjNmVvaWZPRDZMellpelRuNk9TenZpTWh5VV9mcmtWVEhvTGVRSTA1eGp2Z2sxN05jN2NPM3BvUE5mMHBwbmQtd2JPT3BodzU5TEhJQ0dhSVVN?oc=5" target="_blank">STRATEGY SELLS 3,588 BITCOIN IN PERIOD…

item.title: Russia's largest bank plans crypto wallet launch as Moscow clears market path
item.description: Services will integrate into "Sberbank Online" and "SberInvestments" once the "On Digital Currency and Digital Rights" bill takes effect in September.

item.title: SpaceX's Nasdaq 100 inclusion comes with a historical warning
item.description: The largest IPO ever enters the Nasdaq 100. Previous additions like Palantir and Strategy saw volatility after the index inclusion rather than the start of new rallies.

item.title: U.S. inflation outlook underpins bitcoin bulls after best week since March
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 6, 2026

item.title: Crypto bounces back from the brink as altcoin optimism returns despite pockets of weakness
item.description: BTC holds at $62,800 after last week's brush with $58,000, while LIT surges 50% and the Altcoin Season indicator hits its highest reading in three months.

item.title: $60.4K Becomes 'most important area': Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin saw its highest levels in nearly two weeks at the weekly close, but bulls needed a push beyond $65,000 for real trend inflection, said the latest BTC price analysis.

item.title: Bitcoin's Sharpe Ratio slides to lowest since 2022. Here's what it means.
item.description: A reading that negative means investors would have been better off in risk-free assets like 10-year U.S. Treasuries.

item.title: Ripple's preliminary crypto asset provider license in Luxembourg upgraded to fully compliant
item.description: The approval means Ripple is now fully MiCA-compliant for payments, financial institutions, corporates and businesses across all 30 European Economic Area countries.

item.title: New UK Election Funding Rules Could Hit Reform's Crypto Billionaire Donors
item.description: The crackdown on overseas cash comes after billionaire Tether investor and Reform donor Christopher Harborne registered to vote in the UK.

item.title: South Korea weighs action against Polymarket over gambling concerns
item.description: South Korea’s media and communications review body will hear from Polymarket before deciding whether to issue a corrective request against the prediction market platform.

item.title: Coinbase AI draws backlash after erroneously publishing World Cup result before kickoff
item.description: CEO Brian Armstrong investigated, and the firm said it made updates to prevent future AI-generated inaccuracies.

item.title: Dormant $1.9M Bitcoin tied to New York lawsuit moves after nearly 15 years
item.description: A Bitcoin address dormant for nearly 15 years moved $1.9 million in BTC as a New York lawsuit seeks ownership of thousands of inactive holdings.

item.title: FOMC minutes, SpaceX joins Nasdaq 100: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting July 6.

item.title: JUST IN: Ethereum prepares for complete overhaul and biggest upgrade since 'The Merge,' Vitalik Buterin says. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5Bc1gtWWVoNHVLMmdVaTNpSE5MZkt3Y1RGd0dILVFaX1J3NTJXTlhLMDFnN2hiamdzeDZ0Y0ptR1o4SFVQNURYN3pTdkpLMXFXNnNoTmVONk9iS2VJY01DRDV3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Ethereum prepares for com…

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum is preparing its 'biggest rebuild' since the Merge
item.description: A revised roadmap details how the multi-year overhaul would replace nearly every major part of Ethereum's protocol, with quantum resistance and privacy moving up the priority list. It lands as ether rallies more than 12% in the past seven …

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin drops under $62,000 after Strategy sells 3,588 BTC
item.description: Strategy raised $216 milliion with the sale of 3,588 bitcoin last week.

item.title: If we want to make the Lean Ethereum consensus chain aggressively more "lean", and add strong validator privacy (ZK-unlink deposit from staking activity from withdrawal, and re-anonymize stakers every day), here is a path: - x.com

item.title: Nothing has changed on #Bitcoin. There are conflicting theories: - There's a strong bullish divergence indicating that the markets are about to reverse upwards. - There's a potential bearish divergence as price isn't making a higher high, while the indicators are - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBJTzFPTlhYRVpHRUFQTEZfTEhoRWg0ZFJ2UU9aT2w1aUhvRjFVZ3JaNnNXeTVJZUVsT0theHZYNGdEX3hJTDE2dkxnN2dvQkVCeEdjRzFudlFkVXptRDdubHBhNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Nothing has changed on #Bitcoin.…

item.title: Blockaid: Summer fi Under Attack, About $6M Drained According to Blockaid, its exploit detection system identified an ongoing exploit on Summer fi, with about $6 million drained so far. Summer fi is a DeFi yield aggregation and automated vault management - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9sZVNKUWhXckxnUVN3LTJhcVA5WjdFaEZkeFZKdm45ZVFTTVVPclhkUG1zaWlSS3N3V29Qd182OWNmMmgtaEo5amUxSXgwSlRkWGR2NUJCeTdkQ1VVekJRUHhkOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Blockaid: Summer fi Under Attack…

item.title: I am contemplating selling some of my bitcoin for gold, veteran trader Peter Brandt says
item.description: Veteran trader Peter Brandt said gold is going to gain substantially on bitcoin.

item.title: Nigel Farage accepted gifts from crypto-linked fraudster: Report
item.description: Before he was an MP, Nigel Farage was reportedly gifted staff, security and other benefits from George Cottrell, a convicted fraudster involved in a crypto casino.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Stablecoin transaction volume hits record $1.79T in June
item.description: Stablecoins are maturing and are positioned for even greater reach as the market evolves, said crypto researcher Nick Ruck.

item.title: Thousands of crypto wallets at risk from ‘Ill Bloom’ vulnerability: Coinspect
item.description: Thousands of crypto wallets across multiple blockchains could be vulnerable due to weak recovery phrase generation.

item.title: XRP rises 3% as $1.14 breakout turns into support test
item.description: Heavy volume pushed XRP through resistance, but sellers met the move near $1.16 and left traders watching whether former resistance can now hold as support.

item.title: Ether leads crypto's hold above key levels as bitcoin steadies over $63,000
item.description: A stalling rebound in AI and chip stocks and a stronger dollar kept the mood cautious as the second half gets underway.

item.title: Bitcoin will evolve by changing less at the protocol layer and mattering more everywhere else. The base layer will harden. The capital markets will deepen. Digital Credit will expand. The world will build on Bitcoin. $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1IcmxsX243cWRaVnJpT2lzUVJFOFJMdk5pZFZyZVRDVno1VnhYN0hlQVNjc3lJd0NiWWpDdFR2dk45eml0XzZCNXR5Rk82ZGxGV1JjSkR2R2FVcE0?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin will evolve by changing less at the…

item.title: Central bankers sound alarms over agentic AI finance risks
item.description: “We need to think about new tools and a different way of working with the [AI] market in a more collaborative way,” says Nikhil Rathi, CEO of the UK’s finance watchdog.

item.title: Coinbase Criticized Over AI-Generated Fake World Cup Result, Brian Armstrong Says Team Is Investigating According to BeInCrypto, Coinbase faced criticism after an AI-generated prediction market alert claimed Norway had beaten Brazil 3-2 before the matc - x.com

item.title: Trump’s memecoin holders have lost over $3.8B: Report
item.description: Nansen analysis shows that just under half a million wallets profited on Donald Trump’s memecoin, while the large majority of buyers lost out.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner Stress Reaches Historically Rare Level According to @BitcoinNewsCom, the Miner Cycle Stress Composite has fallen to a new 2026 low and entered its “undervalued” range. Similar synchronized declines previously appeared near major Bitcoin - x.com

item.title: Dubai tops Asian crypto hubs, Taiwan passes crypto laws: Asia Express
item.description: Japan's SBI Crypto shuts down 12th largest Bitcoin mining pool in the world, Russia gears up to launch digital ruble despite EU sanctions, and more: Asia Express.

item.title: Clarity and Congress's summer break: State of Crypto
item.description: All parties are still optimistic that Clarity can happen before the midterms, but time is really starting to run out.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
item.description: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

item.title: XPHERE Co-Founder took the Philippine Blockchain Week 2026 main stage for the panel "From Physical to Digital: Bringing Real-World Assets On-Chain" on how reliable Layer-1 infrastructure brings real-world assets on-chain XPHERE also served as Title S - x.com

item.title: Fake Mac Clipboard App Delivers New Password-Stealing Malware
item.description: A new Mac infostealer dubbed PamStealer impersonates the open-source Maccy clipboard manager to steal passwords and more.

item.title: Americans traded $571 million on Polymarket politic bets despite U.S. ban
item.description: U.S.-linked wallets traded $571 million in political contracts over the past year, more than any other country, even though the platform legally cannot serve them. The money leans toward the foreign-conflict markets U.S. venues do not list.

item.title: this is what happens when a crypto company uses AI to generate sports prediction markets @coinbase is hallucinating results for a World Cup game that hasn’t even been played yet and sending factually incorrect notifications to its millions of users as “breakin - x.com

item.title: Banks have stopped asking if stablecoins belong in finance, now they're considering how
item.description: Financial institutions are racing to become the secure gateways for stablecoins as digital asset volume is projected to explode by 2030.

item.title: 🔥 NEW: Vitalik Buterin unveiled a new "Lean Ethereum" roadmap prioritizing quantum resistance, privacy, and scalability over the next 3–4 years. - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin is Digital Energy. - x.com
item.description: Bitcoin is Digital Energy.

item.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
item.description: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

item.title: 🚨 WILD: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows as Ethereum withdrawals surged to their highest level in over three years. - x.com

item.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
item.description: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

item.title: Hard consensus is Bitcoin’s immune system. Fees price block space. Nodes set policy. Miners build blocks. Holders allocate capital. Protocol changes must earn overwhelming alignment, so bad ideas fail before becoming iatrogenic protocol changes. $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBFOG9qN083eWRkVWpiYjlMNHc5dkQ4NGd0Mjh6YkxrVml1M285ZXNOLVNNaGpqSEg3emczQVAtaFZLTGwyVTVWUzF2NU5QWlg4X0JHTTNobXJzT3M?oc=5" target="_blank">Hard consensus is Bitcoin’s immune system. …
